case_title: RON RADONICH ET AL VS. METALMAN SHEET METAL PRODUCTS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RADONICH, RON RMS SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT METALMAN SHEET METAL PRODUCTS CHEUNG, KWOK JUNG, CHARLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADONICH, RON RMS SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, KWOK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADONICH, RON RMS SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT METALMAN SHEET METAL PRODUCTS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, KWOK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RON RADONICH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RMS SUPPLY, REPRESETNED BY RON RADONICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT METALMAN SHEET METAL PRODUCTS, REPRESENTED BY CHARLIE JUNG IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFED CANTONESE INTERPERTER, REBECCA CHAU. . COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE DEFENDANT KWOK CHEUNG. COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE CHARLIE JUNG. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF A SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $5000.00 BY CHECK. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED AT NEXT PROGRESS REPORT DATE. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT METALMAN SHEET METAL PRODUCTS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADONICH, RON RMS SUPPLY AS TO DEFENDANT JUNG, CHARLIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUNG, CHARLIE
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT; MATTER CONTINUED TO SEP-16-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
